---
title: "Interactive Map"
author: "Neda Safari"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(highcharter)

# Load your data
MortalityData <- read.csv("../data/mortality_clean.csv")
NPVisit <- read.csv("../data/NPVisitCleaned.csv")

# Create a function to standardize park names for matching
# This function takes a park name and simplifies it by:
standardize_name <- function(name) {
  name %>%
    tolower() %>%  # Convert everything to lowercase (e.g., "Yosemite" becomes "yosemite")
    str_remove_all("national park|national monument|national recreation area") %>%  # Remove common park designations
    str_remove_all("\\b(the|and|of)\\b") %>%  # Remove filler words like "the", "and", "of"
    str_squish() %>%  # Replace multiple spaces with a single space
    str_trim()  # Remove leading and trailing whitespace
}

# Add a new column to MortalityData with the standardized park name
# This creates "park_std" which will be used for matching
MortalityData <- MortalityData %>%
  mutate(park_std = standardize_name(park))

# Add a new column to NPVisit with the standardized park name
# Now both datasets have a "park_std" column with comparable names
NPVisit <- NPVisit %>%
  mutate(park_std = standardize_name(Parkname))

# Count how many deaths occurred at each park
# group_by(park, park_std) groups rows by both original and standardized names
# summarize(total_deaths = n()) counts the number of rows (deaths) in each group
# .groups = "drop" removes the grouping structure after summarizing
parkDeaths <- MortalityData %>%
  group_by(park, park_std) %>%
  summarize(total_deaths = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Create a manual mapping for ALL 108 parks that don't match automatically
# Add park names and their coordinates here
manual_coords <- tibble(
  park_std = c(
    "acadia",
    "allegheny portage railroad national historic site",
    "amistad",
    "anacostia park",
    "apostle islands national lakeshore",
    "appalachian national scenic trail",
    "assateague island national seashore",
    "baltimore-washington parkway",
    "big bend",
    "big cypress national preserve",
    "big south fork national river recreation area",
    "big thicket national preserve",
    "blue ridge parkway",
    "bluestone national scenic river",
    "boston national historical park",
    "buffalo national river",
    "canaveral national seashore",
    "cape cod national seashore",
    "cape hatteras national seashore",
    "cape lookout national seashore",
    "chattahoochee river",
    "chesapeake & ohio canal national historical park",
    "chickamauga & chattanooga national military park",
    "clara barton national historic site",
    "colonial national historical park",
    "coronado national memorial",
    "craters moon & preserve",
    "cumberland gap national historical park",
    "cumberland island national seashore",
    "delaware water gap",
    "denali & preserve",
    "eisenhower national historic site",
    "everglades",
    "fire island national seashore",
    "first state national historical park",
    "fort bowie national historic site",
    "fort foote park",
    "fort vancouver national historic site",
    "fredericksburg & spotsylvania national military park",
    "friendship hill national historic site",
    "gauley river",
    "gettysburg national military park",
    "glacier bay & preserve",
    "glen echo park",
    "golden spike national historical park",
    "great falls park",
    "great sand dunes & preserve",
    "great smoky mountains",
    "gulf islands national seashore",
    "harpers ferry national historical park",
    "hawaii volcanoes",
    "home franklin d roosevelt national historic site",
    "hopewell culture national historical park",
    "independence national historical park",
    "isle royale",
    "jean lafitte national historical park & preserve",
    "kaloko-honokohau national historical park",
    "katmai & preserve",
    "kenilworth park & aquatic gardens",
    "kennesaw mountain national battlefield park",
    "kings mountain national military park",
    "klondike gold rush national historical park",
    "lake clark & preserve",
    "lake meredith",
    "little river canyon national preserve",
    "lyndon b johnson national historical park",
    "manassas national battlefield park",
    "minute man national historical park",
    "mississippi national river & recreation area",
    "missouri national recreational river",
    "mojave national preserve",
    "morristown national historical park",
    "mount rushmore national memorial",
    "natchez trace parkway",
    "national capital parks-east",
    "national mall & memorial parks",
    "new river gorge national river",
    "niobrara national scenic river",
    "obed wild & scenic river",
    "oxon cove park & oxon hill farm",
    "ozark national scenic riverways",
    "padre island national seashore",
    "paterson great falls national historical park",
    "pea ridge national military park",
    "pecos national historical park",
    "petersburg national battlefield",
    "pictured rocks national lakeshore",
    "point reyes national seashore",
    "president's park (white house)",
    "presidio san francisco",
    "redwood national state parks",
    "richmond national battlefield park",
    "rock creek park",
    "saint croix island international historic site",
    "saint croix national scenic riverway",
    "san antonio missions national historical park",
    "san francisco maritime national historical park",
    "san juan island national historical park",
    "saratoga national historical park",
    "sequoia & kings canyon s",
    "shenandoah",
    "sleeping bear dunes national lakeshore",
    "suitland",
    "upper delaware scenic & recreational river",
    "valley forge national historical park",
    "whiskeytown",
    "wilson's creek national battlefield",
    "wrangell - st elias & reserve"
  ),
  lat = c(
    44.3386,   # Acadia
    40.4564,   # Allegheny Portage Railroad
    29.5347,   # Amistad
    38.8900,   # Anacostia Park
    47.0198,   # Apostle Islands
    40.0000,   # Appalachian Trail (midpoint)
    38.0525,   # Assateague Island
    39.0300,   # Baltimore-Washington Parkway
    29.2500,   # Big Bend
    25.9739,   # Big Cypress
    36.5417,   # Big South Fork
    30.4575,   # Big Thicket
    36.0000,   # Blue Ridge Parkway (midpoint)
    37.6139,   # Bluestone
    42.3736,   # Boston
    36.0408,   # Buffalo National River
    28.7619,   # Canaveral
    41.9268,   # Cape Cod
    35.3582,   # Cape Hatteras
    34.9876,   # Cape Lookout
    34.0094,   # Chattahoochee River
    39.4582,   # Chesapeake & Ohio Canal
    34.9404,   # Chickamauga & Chattanooga
    38.9675,   # Clara Barton
    37.2275,   # Colonial
    31.3450,   # Coronado
    43.4162,   # Craters of the Moon
    36.5925,   # Cumberland Gap
    30.8535,   # Cumberland Island
    41.1167,   # Delaware Water Gap
    63.1148,   # Denali
    39.8069,   # Eisenhower
    25.2866,   # Everglades
    40.7325,   # Fire Island
    39.8282,   # First State
    32.1542,   # Fort Bowie
    38.7745,   # Fort Foote Park
    45.6247,   # Fort Vancouver
    38.2996,   # Fredericksburg & Spotsylvania
    39.7850,   # Friendship Hill
    38.1367,   # Gauley River
    39.8111,   # Gettysburg
    58.6650,   # Glacier Bay
    38.9676,   # Glen Echo Park
    41.6197,   # Golden Spike
    38.9984,   # Great Falls Park
    37.7916,   # Great Sand Dunes
    35.6118,   # Great Smoky Mountains
    30.3950,   # Gulf Islands
    39.3232,   # Harpers Ferry
    19.4194,   # Hawaii Volcanoes
    41.7682,   # Home of Franklin D Roosevelt
    39.3518,   # Hopewell Culture
    39.9496,   # Independence
    47.9959,   # Isle Royale
    29.8550,   # Jean Lafitte
    19.6781,   # Kaloko-Honokohau
    58.5970,   # Katmai
    38.9078,   # Kenilworth Park & Aquatic Gardens
    33.9815,   # Kennesaw Mountain
    35.1390,   # Kings Mountain
    59.4600,   # Klondike Gold Rush
    60.9666,   # Lake Clark
    35.6969,   # Lake Meredith
    34.3870,   # Little River Canyon
    30.2463,   # Lyndon B Johnson
    38.8130,   # Manassas
    42.4495,   # Minute Man
    44.9778,   # Mississippi National River
    42.7831,   # Missouri National Recreational River
    35.1406,   # Mojave
    40.7967,   # Morristown
    43.8791,   # Mount Rushmore
    33.7500,   # Natchez Trace Parkway (midpoint)
    38.8861,   # National Capital Parks-East
    38.8895,   # National Mall & Memorial Parks
    37.8733,   # New River Gorge
    42.8064,   # Niobrara
    36.1144,   # Obed Wild & Scenic River
    38.7909,   # Oxon Cove Park & Oxon Hill Farm
    37.1344,   # Ozark National Scenic Riverways
    27.3689,   # Padre Island
    40.9164,   # Paterson Great Falls
    36.4528,   # Pea Ridge
    35.5500,   # Pecos
    37.2146,   # Petersburg
    46.5653,   # Pictured Rocks
    38.0497,   # Point Reyes
    38.8977,   # President's Park (White House)
    37.7989,   # Presidio of San Francisco
    41.2132,   # Redwood
    37.4404,   # Richmond
    38.9597,   # Rock Creek Park
    45.1287,   # Saint Croix Island
    45.8983,   # Saint Croix National Scenic Riverway
    29.3366,   # San Antonio Missions
    37.8086,   # San Francisco Maritime
    48.5300,   # San Juan Island
    43.0028,   # Saratoga
    36.4864,   # Sequoia & Kings Canyon
    38.5326,   # Shenandoah
    44.8606,   # Sleeping Bear Dunes
    38.8462,   # Suitland
    41.6583,   # Upper Delaware Scenic & Recreational River
    40.0962,   # Valley Forge
    40.6350,   # Whiskeytown
    37.1302,   # Wilson's Creek
    61.7103    # Wrangell-St. Elias
  ),
  lon = c(
    -68.2733,  # Acadia
    -78.6100,  # Allegheny Portage Railroad
    -101.0775, # Amistad
    -76.9600,  # Anacostia Park
    -90.6560,  # Apostle Islands
    -78.0000,  # Appalachian Trail (midpoint)
    -75.2444,  # Assateague Island
    -76.8500,  # Baltimore-Washington Parkway
    -103.2500, # Big Bend
    -81.0839,  # Big Cypress
    -84.7167,  # Big South Fork
    -94.3925,  # Big Thicket
    -80.0000,  # Blue Ridge Parkway (midpoint)
    -80.8711,  # Bluestone
    -71.0570,  # Boston
    -92.8803,  # Buffalo National River
    -80.7494,  # Canaveral
    -70.0267,  # Cape Cod
    -75.5500,  # Cape Hatteras
    -76.3416,  # Cape Lookout
    -84.2809,  # Chattahoochee River
    -77.7500,  # Chesapeake & Ohio Canal
    -85.2547,  # Chickamauga & Chattanooga
    -77.1383,  # Clara Barton
    -76.6122,  # Colonial
    -110.3200, # Coronado
    -113.5161, # Craters of the Moon
    -83.6642,  # Cumberland Gap
    -81.4543,  # Cumberland Island
    -74.9050,  # Delaware Water Gap
    -151.1926, # Denali
    -77.2311,  # Eisenhower
    -80.8987,  # Everglades
    -73.1089,  # Fire Island
    -75.5465,  # First State
    -109.4497, # Fort Bowie
    -77.0192,  # Fort Foote Park
    -122.6615, # Fort Vancouver
    -77.5186,  # Fredericksburg & Spotsylvania
    -79.9342,  # Friendship Hill
    -81.0031,  # Gauley River
    -77.2311,  # Gettysburg
    -136.9000, # Glacier Bay
    -77.1403,  # Glen Echo Park
    -112.5485, # Golden Spike
    -77.2525,  # Great Falls Park
    -105.5943, # Great Sand Dunes
    -83.4895,  # Great Smoky Mountains
    -87.0300,  # Gulf Islands
    -77.7383,  # Harpers Ferry
    -155.2885, # Hawaii Volcanoes
    -73.9338,  # Home of Franklin D Roosevelt
    -83.0641,  # Hopewell Culture
    -75.1480,  # Independence
    -88.5485,  # Isle Royale
    -90.1250,  # Jean Lafitte
    -156.0250, # Kaloko-Honokohau
    -155.0000, # Katmai
    -76.9444,  # Kenilworth Park & Aquatic Gardens
    -84.5794,  # Kennesaw Mountain
    -81.3936,  # Kings Mountain
    -135.3150, # Klondike Gold Rush
    -153.4166, # Lake Clark
    -101.6981, # Lake Meredith
    -85.6047,  # Little River Canyon
    -98.6200,  # Lyndon B Johnson
    -77.5211,  # Manassas
    -71.3083,  # Minute Man
    -93.2650,  # Mississippi National River
    -97.3903,  # Missouri National Recreational River
    -115.5144, # Mojave
    -74.5394,  # Morristown
    -103.4591, # Mount Rushmore
    -88.0000,  # Natchez Trace Parkway (midpoint)
    -76.9722,  # National Capital Parks-East
    -77.0200,  # National Mall & Memorial Parks
    -81.0636,  # New River Gorge
    -100.0836, # Niobrara
    -84.9261,  # Obed Wild & Scenic River
    -77.0164,  # Oxon Cove Park & Oxon Hill Farm
    -91.5486,  # Ozark National Scenic Riverways
    -97.3128,  # Padre Island
    -74.1736,  # Paterson Great Falls
    -94.0353,  # Pea Ridge
    -105.6800, # Pecos
    -77.3839,  # Petersburg
    -86.4489,  # Pictured Rocks
    -122.8736, # Point Reyes
    -77.0365,  # President's Park (White House)
    -122.4662, # Presidio of San Francisco
    -124.0046, # Redwood
    -77.3400,  # Richmond
    -77.0500,  # Rock Creek Park
    -67.1317,  # Saint Croix Island
    -92.3667,  # Saint Croix National Scenic Riverway
    -98.4861,  # San Antonio Missions
    -122.4192, # San Francisco Maritime
    -123.0600, # San Juan Island
    -73.5883,  # Saratoga
    -118.5658, # Sequoia & Kings Canyon
    -78.3499,  # Shenandoah
    -86.0517,  # Sleeping Bear Dunes
    -76.9280,  # Suitland
    -75.0333,  # Upper Delaware Scenic & Recreational River
    -75.4400,  # Valley Forge
    -122.5173, # Whiskeytown
    -93.4319,  # Wilson's Creek
    -142.9857  # Wrangell-St. Elias
  )
)

# Join the death counts with the park location data
# left_join keeps all parks from parkDeaths and adds matching data from NPVisit
# by = "park_std" means we're matching on the standardized park names
park_map_data <- parkDeaths %>%
  left_join(NPVisit %>% select(park_std, lat, lon), by = "park_std")

# Find parks that are missing coordinates after the first join
missing_coords <- park_map_data %>%
  filter(is.na(lat) | is.na(lon))

# If there are parks missing coordinates, try to fill them from manual_coords
if(nrow(missing_coords) > 0) {
  message("\nWarning: The following parks were missing coordinates and have been filled manually:")
  print(missing_coords %>% select(park, total_deaths))
  
  # Update park_map_data by filling in manual coordinates where available
  # coalesce() picks the first non-NA value, so it uses NPVisit coords first,
  # then falls back to manual_coords if NPVisit coords are missing
  park_map_data <- park_map_data %>%
    left_join(manual_coords, by = "park_std", suffix = c("", "_manual")) %>%
    mutate(
      lat = coalesce(lat, lat_manual),    # Use NPVisit lat, or manual lat if NA
      lon = coalesce(lon, lon_manual)     # Use NPVisit lon, or manual lon if NA
    ) %>%
    select(-lat_manual, -lon_manual)  # Remove the temporary manual columns
}
# Remove parks that still don't have coordinates after manual mapping
# filter(!is.na(lat) & !is.na(lon)) keeps only parks with valid coordinates
# mutate(z = total_deaths) creates a "z" column (needed by highcharter for bubble size)
park_map_data <- park_map_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lat) & !is.na(lon)) %>%
  mutate(z = total_deaths)
write.csv(park_map_data, "../data/park_map_data.csv")
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(highcharter)
park_map_data <- read.csv("../data/park_map_data.csv")
# Create the interactive map
# hcmap() creates a base map of the United States
# "countries/us/us-all" specifies we want a US map
# nullColor sets the color for states/areas without data
# borderWidth sets how thick the state borders are
# showInLegend = FALSE hides the base map from the legend
hcmap("countries/us/us-all", 
      nullColor = "#d3d3d3",
      borderWidth = 0.5,
      showInLegend = FALSE) %>%
  # hc_add_series adds a new layer to the map - in this case, bubbles
  hc_add_series(
    data = park_map_data,  # The data frame with park locations and death counts
    type = "mapbubble",  # Create bubbles on the map
    name = "Deaths",  # Legend label
    minSize = 5,  # Smallest bubble size (in pixels)
    maxSize = 50,  # Largest bubble size (in pixels)
    color = "#FF0000",  # Bubble color (red)
    dataLabels = list(enabled = FALSE)  # Don't show labels on the bubbles themselves
  ) %>%
  # hc_tooltip configures what appears when you hover over a bubble
  hc_tooltip(
    useHTML = TRUE,  # Allow HTML formatting in the tooltip
    headerFormat = '',  # No header in the tooltip
    # pointFormat defines what text shows: park name and death count
    pointFormat = "<b>{point.park}</b><br/>Total Deaths: {point.total_deaths}"
  ) %>%
  # hc_mapNavigation adds zoom and pan controls to the map
  hc_mapNavigation(enabled = TRUE) %>%
  # hc_title adds a title at the top of the map
  hc_title(text = "National Park Mortality Counts")
```
